titleStmt.title: SII 39.192: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 192. (A.R. No. 192 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL NALLASIDDHARASA OF THE FAMILY OF MUKKAṆA KĀḌUVEṬṬI -15TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription states that in accordance with an order of the king, the earlier tirunāmattukkāṇi village Kaṭṭanūr including Paḻaiyagaram and Puttagaram, were confirmed as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam gift to the temple. The king belonged to the Bharatvāja gōtra and described as the ornaments of the Pallava race.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastaneka mahimaṇḍala Irājādirāja Irājaparameśvara paramavamśotbhava pallava kulatilaka bhāradavāja gotra pavitrallitāt
citratara khaḍvāṅgadvaja kaboyu paraghoṭiṇa ṣugalātma tiruveṅkaṭa nāthadaiva śrī pādapatma rāga kāñcipuravarādiśvara kāmakoṣṭam
bigāmdevīlaktavara prajādaśameraprajaṇḍa jaladaṅga cavairībha bhuvana nārāyaṇa bhujaṅga vibhuṣaṇanoveṭa sāgasāt janaśrī parvapūrva dribhāga sapta
sadāgrahāra pratiṣṭhatābharaṇa nitya gaṅgājala pravahat maṇikkuṭa kaṭaka śaraṇālayapiṭa bhuloka śaturvarṇṇarāśrāya dharmma pratiṣṭadā
paraṇa śrī mukkaṇa kāṭuveṭṭi vamśākhadāra praśiddha nallacittaraca Ollai tāmarkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār vijayarāghava peru
māḷ koyil tānattār kaṇṭu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa kaṭṭanūrp paḻaakaramum puttakaramum Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyākat tāṅ
kaḷ muṉṉāḷ kalkoṭuṭaiyapaṭiye patiṉaiñcāvatu mutal tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka nāmum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiiliyāka sarvvamāṉiyamāka kuṭuttom Iṉṉāḷ
mutal sarvvamāṉiyamāka Aṉubhavippatu Ippaṭi cantirātittavarai celluvatāka Utakam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷ
vate Ivai nallacittaracaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
